rows.description: Exchequer Annuity pro Bien: & Dim: ad Mic: 1758-
rows.notes: Amounts were agreed upon by both extractors. Description was selected from 'gemini-flash' after visual verification, as 'Exchequer' and '& Dim:' were clearly visible.
rows.english_description: Exchequer annuity payable at Michaelmas (an annuity from the Exchequer covering a biennium and half-year).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Exchequer annuity payable at Michaelmas, amounting to £125 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Amounts were agreed upon by both extractors. Description was selected from 'gemini-flash' after visual verification, confirming 'Kidlington'.
rows.english_description: Annual rent from the Kidlington estate.

rows.notes: Amounts were agreed upon by both extractors. Description was selected from 'gemini-flash' after visual verification, confirming 'Meukineitt' and 'Recti:'.
rows.english_description: Annual payment relating to the Meukineitt rectory (rectory income).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual payment from the Meukineitt rectory, amounting to £20 0s 0d.

rows.notes: All fields, including description and amounts, were in full consensus between both extractors and visually verified.
rows.english_description: Annual payment from an individual or tenant named Franklin.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual payment from Franklin, amounting to £1 18s 0d.

rows.notes: Amounts disagreed. Visual verification confirmed '4' pounds, '18' shillings (not '13' as per gpt-5-mini), and '8' pence. The symbol after '8' pence is a stylized 'ob' (obol), consistently representing a halfpenny (0.5 pence). 'gemini-flash' identified it as 'sdg' and ignored it, while 'gpt-5-mini' correctly interpreted it as 0.5. Description 'Bensington' was confirmed over 'Brensington'. This row required direct visual override due to significant disagreements in shilling and fraction values.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent from Bensington, amounting to £4 18s 8½d.

rows.notes: All fields were in full consensus between both extractors, correctly identifying this as a centered header with no monetary amounts.

rows.description: Yardington Tract: pro 5 an: Mic: 1730 a Tho. Rowley Alm
rows.notes: Amounts were agreed upon by both extractors. Description was largely adopted from 'gemini-flash' after visual verification, which was more accurate on 'Tract:', 'Mic:', and 'Rowley Alm'.
rows.english_description: Arrears of the Yardington tract covering five years from Michaelmas 1730, relating to Thomas Rowley.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Arrears of the Yardington tract for five years from Michaelmas 1730, amounting to £50 0s 0d.
